managed_metrics.description: Checks if claims are backed by the provided Wikipedia or Docs context.
Factuality check: segments response into atomic claims and verifies grounding in tool outputs.
Evaluates parameter mapping and tool choice against the agent's definition (Reference-free).

rubric_metrics.description: Compares semantic meaning of agent response against the reference answer (Reference-based).
Dynamically generated rubrics for each prompt with granular pass/fail feedback.
